texto: practice only envisioning yourself at the finish line and be unrelenting and fervent in racing towards that finish line. Undue preoccupation and fixation with the how's, whens, and what ifs will not only derail and further distance you from your destination, but will also feed your mind with those fatal seeds of doubt that make failure inevitable" ~ Awaken and Unleash your Victor
explicacao: Citação de Ogor Winnie Okoye sobre temas ligados a autoestima. “practice only envisioning yourself at the finish line and be unrelenting and fervent in racing to…” articula autoestima, doubt, faith em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como faith e positive-quotes.
